comments.LineComment: | Infinite scroll - load more content as user scrolls
| Intersection Observer-based infinite loading with bi-directional
| support, error states, and VirtualScroll integration.

value.value: w-4 h-4 border-2 border-current border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin
px-4 py-2 text-sm bg-secondary hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md
